summary: Complete verification of AI-generated party products feature. Backend APIs return party products with Cloudinary images. Frontend Party & Decor modal displays 33 items with AI-generated products appearing first.

test_results.api_party_accessories: ✅ PASS - 16 products returned, 10 AI-generated with Cloudinary images
test_results.api_party_kits: ✅ PASS - 7 products returned, 3 AI-generated with Cloudinary images
test_results.api_celebration_addons: ✅ PASS - 8 products returned, 2 AI-generated with Cloudinary images
test_results.ai_products_sorted_first: ✅ PASS - ai_image_generated=True products appear first in results (server.py line 7767)
test_results.cloudinary_images_valid: ✅ PASS - All AI products have valid https://res.cloudinary.com/duoapcx1p URLs
test_results.party_decor_modal: ✅ PASS - Modal shows 33 items, AI products at top (Birthday Headband Collection, Party Glasses & Hat Combo, Celebration Bow Tie Set, etc.)
test_results.total_ai_products: ✅ PASS - 15 AI-generated products across all party categories (10+3+2)

backend_api_verification.sorting_by_ai_image_generated: Line 7767: ('ai_image_generated', -1) ensures AI products appear first ✅

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ generate_party_accessory_images.py correctly creates products in products_master collection
✅ Cloudinary images stored in image_url field
✅ CelebrateContentModal.jsx fetches from party_accessories, party_kits, celebration_addons (lines 85-90)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Party & Decor modal displays products correctly

seed_data_creation: 15 AI-generated party products created via generate_party_accessory_images.py with Cloudinary images
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI-generated party products feature complete. 15 products created across 3 categories (party_accessories=10, party_kits=3, celebration_addons=2). All have Cloudinary images and appear first in API results. Party & Decor modal shows 33 total items.
